{{Infobox concept
| name = King’s Key
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[King]]’s Key is a [[Path]] created and exclusively practiced by [[Monarch]] [[Reigan Shen]], [[the Emperor]] of the [[Rosegold continent]]. This force Path is characterized by its connection to spatial authority, a power [[Shen]] acquired after bonding with a [[Sage’s Remnant]] during his youth. The [[Path]] allows the user to manipulate an extra-spatial vault, which serves as a storage dimension for various items including weapons, techniques, enemies, and sacred instruments. Beyond simple storage, the [[Path]] can be used to create portals, deploy emergency defenses, and manifest razor-edged blades or grips made of [[madra]]. While the [[Path]] is highly efficient for opening portals to spatially sealed treasures, it also enables the user to transport armies across vast distances.}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[King’s Key]] is a title held by the [[Monarch]] [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] keeps deadly weapons in his [[King’s Key]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] is the master of the [[King’s Key]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[King]]'s Key is a portal.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] calls up [[King’s Key madra]] as a defense.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] opened his [[King’s Key]] to activate a [[sacred instrument]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
